jd_text: Our client, a well established and respected trust and consulting firm head-quartered in the Channel Islands, is looking to hire a director for its Dubai office. The primary objective of this role is to oversee the development of the office while working towards upgrading the necessary licenses to operate in the region. A robust business development profile is essential to drive growth in the area, which will be supported by their international offices until a business license is obtained. A minimum of 5 years trust experience is required. In this senior position, you will report directly to the Managing Director overseeing the Dubai operations, who is primarily based in Europe. Preference will be given to experienced trust professionals already based in the region who have a very good grasp of the local environment and business regulations. If you believe you have the necessary skills to meet our client's discerning requirements and are eager to seize this exciting opportunity, please email your current CV with any relevant information to vanessa.raine@ap-executive.com AP Group is acting as an introductory service in relation to this vacancy. By submitting your CV for consideration, you are consenting to its retention for the purpose of securing you work. Any information you provide to AP Group and its subsidiaries will be subject to the protection of Data Protection Laws, our policy for which can be found at https://www.apgroupglobal.com/privacy-notice/
